meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Scaling Projects with Antigravity & Claude
content.seo_description: Break through the 'basic app' ceiling. Learn how to leverage project management workflows with Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver premium SaaS results.
content.answer_block: Stop building disposable scripts. To scale, implement a robust project management architecture using Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative logic. By decoupling your business logic from the UI and enforcing strict state management, you transform basic prototypes into high-performance, client-ready SaaS applications in record time.
content.intro:
The ceiling of basic app development is brutal. You start with a vision, code a functional prototype, and suddenly find yourself trapped in a labyrinth of unmanageable state, spaghetti logic, and a codebase that crumbles under the weight of a single feature request. It is the graveyard of freelance ambition—where projects go to die because they lack a structural backbone.

But the gap between a 'basic app' and a 'premium SaaS' isn't just better code; it's superior project management. By integrating Antigravity for structural integrity and Claude Code for high-velocity logic implementation, you shift from being a coder to an architect. It is time to stop hacking and start building systems that scale, impress clients, and stand the test of time.

steps.title: Architecting the Domain Model
steps.description: Define your data entities before writing a single line of UI code. This ensures your app logic is decoupled and robust.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this business requirement and generate a normalized database schema and TypeScript interface definitions that prioritize scalability and data integrity.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'Create a domain model directory structure based on the provided requirements.'

steps.title: Scaffolding with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate boilerplate that follows industry-standard patterns, saving you hours of repetitive setup.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a clean-architecture backend structure using the previously defined domain models, including service layers and repository patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'Generate the service layer boilerplate using the Antigravity scaffold configuration.'

steps.title: Implementing Business Logic via Claude Code
steps.description: Inject complex logic into your services using Claude Code's context-aware editing to maintain consistency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the service layer and implement the core business logic for user authentication and resource management based on these specs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /edit 'Implement the core business logic in the service layer while maintaining strict type safety.'

steps.title: Automated Integration Testing
steps.description: Ensure your project management system holds up by automating the verification of your service layer interactions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of integration tests for the service layer that covers edge cases and ensures transactional integrity.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /test 'Run the generated integration tests and fix any failing assertions.'

steps.title: Refining for Production Performance
steps.description: Finalize your build by optimizing for latency and resource consumption using automated performance auditing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the codebase for performance bottlenecks and suggest optimizations for database queries and memory allocation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /audit 'Apply performance optimizations suggested by the Antigravity analysis.'

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'Contract-First' development strategy; define your API schemas before touching the frontend code.
Use Claude Code's 'session context' to keep your architectural decisions consistent across multiple files.
Leverage Antigravity's 'Template Injection' to standardize your error handling across every microservice.
Prioritize 'Idempotency' in your API endpoints to ensure your app remains stable even when network requests fail.
Automate your documentation by having Claude Code parse your JSDoc comments into a README during every commit.
content.next_steps: Deploy your project to a staging environment and run a load test to verify your architecture's resilience before handing it off to your client.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to build like a senior engineer. Stop settling for basic apps and start delivering premium, scalable solutions that command higher rates. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
